steps.title: Use the title as a signal
steps.content: The UNESCO title marks Chengdu as having a distinctive food culture. The blank needs a verb meaning that the title indicates or signifies that status.

steps.title: Reject mismatched meanings
steps.content: A means rejects, which contradicts the recognition. B means finds something unknown, and C means expresses dissatisfaction. The word meaning 'indicates' or 'signifies' fits how a title communicates meaning. The answer is D.
